text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the cafeteria deciding on what to eat
when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Eishin Flash staring at all the dishes on
display with a furrowed brow.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The dish I am partial to here was suddenly
removed from the menu today due to supply
issues...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This has disrupted my planned food intake and
has left me at a loss for what to do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Formulating a new menu plan now would carry a
high risk of introducing extended delays to the
rest of my scheduled activities...
choice_data_list: Why not take this chance to try something new?
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Formulating a new menu plan now would carry a
high risk of introducing extended delays to the
rest of my scheduled activities...
choice_data_list: Why not take this chance to try something new?
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you are correct. I shall use this
opportunity to expand the breadth of my food
selection here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That way, I will be able to create a sub-plan to
deal with unexpected occurrences like what
happened today.
choice_data_list:
You might discover something unexpectedly
delicious too.

You might discover something unexpectedly
delicious too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. If that is the case, perhaps this change of
plans will be quite beneficial.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After thanking me, Eishin Flash returns to
choosing a dish to eat.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It is as you say. All that remains is for me to
perform a swift reworking of my plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will check my planned nutritional intake for
today and compare it to the menu items that are
currently displayed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After thanking me, Eishin Flash returns to
choosing a dish to eat.
